title: Software Engineering Instructor
description: Teach undergraduate and graduate software engineering courses, mentor student projects, and support curriculum development for modern application development.
qualifications: Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field. 4+ years industry experience in software engineering and experience teaching or mentoring teams.
experience: 4+ years in software development and classroom or lab instruction.

title: Computer Science Lab Coordinator
description: Manage CS lab operations, maintain hardware and software resources, support faculty and student lab projects, and oversee lab assistants.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Information Technology. Experience supporting technical lab environments and managing equipment inventories.
experience: 2+ years managing technology labs or academic support services.

title: Cybersecurity Lecturer
description: Deliver hands-on cybersecurity curriculum, oversee secure coding workshops, and coordinate incident response simulations for students.
qualifications: Master's or PhD in Cybersecurity, Information Security, or related discipline. Professional experience in security operations, risk assessment, or penetration testing.
experience: 5+ years in cybersecurity roles with academic or training experience.

title: AI Research Fellow
description: Collaborate on AI research projects, publish findings, mentor undergraduate researchers, and support grant writing in the university's emerging AI lab.
qualifications: PhD preferred in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, or related field. Research publications and experience with machine learning frameworks required.
experience: 3+ years of research experience in AI or machine learning.

title: Web Development Instructor
description: Teach web development, front-end frameworks, and responsive design. Support student portfolios and organize industry guest sessions.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related subject. Experience with modern JavaScript frameworks and teaching or tutoring technical learners.
experience: 2+ years developing web applications and mentoring learners.

title: Data Science Instructor
description: Deliver curriculum in statistics, data visualization, and machine learning with project-based labs using Python and cloud analytics tools.
qualifications: Master's degree in Data Science, Statistics, or related field. Experience teaching data analytics subjects and advising student capstone teams.
experience: 4+ years in data analytics, research, or teaching.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Support campus operations with reporting, dashboard creation, and data-driven recommendations across enrollment and finance teams.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Analytics, Business Intelligence, or a related field. Strong skills with SQL, Power BI, or Tableau.
experience: 3+ years in data analytics or business intelligence.

title: Quantitative Researcher
description: Design research studies, analyze complex datasets, and present findings to support academic and applied research initiatives.
qualifications: Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, or related field. Experience with advanced modeling and collaboration with academic researchers.
experience: 5+ years in quantitative research or analytics.

title: Data Analytics Coordinator
description: Coordinate analytics initiatives across departments, build data pipelines, and train staff on best practices in data use.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Analytics, Computer Science, or equivalent. Experience with data tools and stakeholder communication.
experience: 3+ years supporting analytics or data operations.

title: Machine Learning Lab Manager
description: Lead lab operations for machine learning research, maintain compute infrastructure, and support student research teams with model development.
qualifications: Master's degree in ML, AI, or Computer Science. Experience managing technical labs and supporting multiple research projects.
experience: 4+ years in research lab coordination or technical operations.

title: Financial Aid Advisor
description: Advise students on financial aid eligibility, manage award packaging, and ensure compliance with federal and state aid regulations.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, or Education. Knowledge of Title IV regulations and financial aid systems is required.
experience: 2+ years working in higher education financial aid.

title: Budget Analyst
description: Prepare budget forecasts, analyze spending trends, and partner with academic units to align resources with institutional priorities.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration. Strong analytical skills and experience with budget management systems.
experience: 3+ years in budget analysis or financial planning.

title: Procurement Specialist
description: Manage procurement contracts, support vendor selection, and ensure purchasing compliance for campus-wide goods and services.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or Supply Chain Management. Experience with public purchasing rules preferred.
experience: 3+ years in procurement or contract administration.

title: Grants Manager
description: Oversee grant proposals, coordinate sponsor reporting, and support faculty and staff in managing award budgets.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Public Administration, or related field. Familiarity with grant compliance and accounting required.
experience: 4+ years managing grants in higher education or nonprofit settings.

title: Treasury Operations Lead
description: Lead daily treasury operations, manage cash flow forecasting, and coordinate banking relationships for the college.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or Economics. Experience with treasury systems and financial controls required.
experience: 5+ years in treasury or finance operations.

title: Marketing Communications Manager
description: Lead external communications, brand campaigns, and digital storytelling to attract prospective students and promote campus programs.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Journalism. Strong writing and digital media experience required.
experience: 4+ years in higher education or corporate marketing communications.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Develop paid and organic digital campaigns, manage social media channels, and analyze performance metrics to grow enrollment and engagement.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Digital Media, or related field. Experience with digital advertising platforms and analytics tools.
experience: 2+ years in digital marketing and content strategy.

title: Admissions Marketing Coordinator
description: Create recruitment campaigns and support admissions outreach with targeted digital and event-driven marketing strategies.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Education. Strong background in admissions outreach or student recruitment marketing.
experience: 3+ years coordinating marketing or admissions communications.

title: Public Relations Officer
description: Manage media outreach, press releases, and reputation communications for campus initiatives and institutional milestones.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Public Relations, Communications, or Journalism. Proven experience in media relations or public affairs.
experience: 3+ years in public relations or communications.

title: Social Media Administrator
description: Create social media content, monitor community engagement, and support the marketing team's digital outreach plans.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field. Experience with social media management tools and content creation.
experience: 2+ years producing social media campaigns.

title: Admissions Counselor
description: Advise prospective students, coordinate campus tours, and manage application processing for undergraduate enrollment.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree required. Strong communication and customer service skills. Experience with recruitment or admissions preferred.
experience: 2+ years in admissions, recruitment, or student advising.

title: Enrollment Manager
description: Lead enrollment strategy, coordinate recruitment events, and analyze yield metrics to help meet the college's enrollment targets.

experience: 4+ years in admissions or enrollment management.

title: Transfer Admissions Specialist
description: Support transfer applicants, review transcripts, and develop articulation agreements with community colleges.

title: Student Recruitment Analyst
description: Analyze recruitment data, support CRM management, and help the admissions team improve conversion through targeted outreach.

title: Facilities Maintenance Supervisor
description: Supervise facilities maintenance staff, coordinate preventive maintenance, and support capital improvement projects across campus buildings.

description: Lead campus planning efforts, support space allocation, and collaborate with architects on renovation and expansion projects.

title: Energy Management Coordinator
description: Coordinate energy efficiency programs, monitor utility usage, and support sustainability initiatives across campus facilities.

description: Oversee grounds maintenance crews, plan seasonal landscaping, and support campus events requiring outdoor setup.

title: Pharmacy Technician

title: Head Strength Coach

description: Develop nutrition plans for student-athletes, deliver workshops, and coordinate with sports medicine staff.

title: Archives Specialist
